last_run_note: No trades; held NVDA/GLD/SHY — diversification already in place and no new catalyst since yesterday's buys (GOOGL earnings pending, oil spike too speculative).

schedule_gaps.detail: Only the 15:00 CDT (20:00 UTC) cycle ran today; confirmed by git history (single 2026-07-22 commit) and single-entry data/history.json and data/research_log.json for that date. The three-cycles-per-day cadence was only committed to TRADING_POLICY.md at 2026-07-21T23:19:02Z, after that day's 3pm slot had passed — likely explanation is the routine's actual cron trigger wasn't reconfigured to 3x/day until sometime on 2026-07-22, after the 9am and noon windows had already passed, but this is unconfirmed since the trigger config isn't inspectable from a coding session. Flagged for the operator to verify the routine's schedule directly.
